<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Junior</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
<nav>
  <h1>Login</h1>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">End</a></li>
  </ul>
 <div class="InputContainer">
  <input placeholder="Search.." id="input" class="input" name="text" type="text">"
  
</div>
</nav>
  <header class="header">
    <h1>Travel</h1>
    <p>We are go to mountine</p>
    <button class="bone2">START</button>
  </header>
  <div>
    <h2>About us</h2>
  <main class="mon">
    <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTwgPP03C7DTCFXYnLNYVyfdiX_FdCuk0SS5g&s"/>
    <p>A mountain is a landform that rises prominently above its surroundings, typically characterized by steep slopes and a high point called a peak or summit. While there is no universal geological height definition, many geologists and dictionaries classify a landform as a mountain if it rises at least 1,000 feet (300 meters) to 2,000 feet (610 meters) above the surrounding land; anything lower is generally considered a hill.</p>
  </main>
  </div>
  <div>
     <h2>Camping</h2>
  <div class="cards">
  <div class="card">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Brawl Stars">
    <h2>Brawl Stars</h2>
    <p>
      Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
    </p>
    <button>Read more</button>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Clash of Clans">
    <h2>Clash of Clans</h2>
    <p>
      Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
    </p>
    <button>Read more</button>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="PUBG">
    <h2>PUBG</h2>
    <p>
      Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
    </p>
    <button>Read more</button>
  </div>
</div>
  </div>
  <h2>Contacts</h2>
  <p>Hello, do you need help? If so, call this number.</p>
  <p class="end">+77 7777 777</p>
  <footer>
    <ul>
    <li><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">End</a></li>
    </ul>
  </footer>
</body>
</html>
